# Sample Markdown

This is a **test document** used by Yole challenges to verify
format detection and rendering.

## Features

- Bold text: **bold**
- Italic text: *italic*
- Code: `inline code`
- Links: [example](https://example.com)

## Code Block

```kotlin
fun main() {
    println("Hello from Yole!")
}
```

## Table

| Format | Extension | Status |
|--------|-----------|--------|
| Markdown | .md | Active |
| Todo.txt | .txt | Active |
| CSV | .csv | Active |

> Blockquote for testing edge cases.
